name: python3-argon2
title: python3-argon2
summary: Argon2 password hashing library - Python 3.x Module
description:
Argon2 password hashing library - Python 3.x Module
Argon2 is a password-hashing function that can be used to hash passwords
for credential storage, key derivation, or other applications.
.
There are two main versions of Argon2: Argon2i and Argon2d.
Argon2i is the safest against side-channel attacks, while Argon2d provides
the highest resistance against GPU cracking attacks.
.
Argon2i and Argon2d are parametrized by:
* A time cost, which defines the amount of computation realized and
therefore the execution time, given in number of iterations
* A memory cost, which defines the memory usage, given in kibibytes
* A parallelism degree, which defines the number of parallel threads
.
This module provides argon2 hashing primitives for the Python 3 programming
language.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-argon2 because Argon2 password hashing library - Python 3.x Module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-argon2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-argon2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-argon2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
